revision.text: {{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[:en:ES2017|ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[:en:ES2017|ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article, enforcing [[WP:NOPIPE]] |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article, enforcing [[WP:NOPIPE]] |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FUnpipe here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=Unpipe |desc=Converts each piped link to a non-piped one if both lead to the same article, enforcing [[WP:NOPIPE]] |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. ([[ES2017]]+ needed) |source=[[User:Nardog/Unpipe.js]] }} This script adds a button to the sidebar that converts [[Wikipedia:Piped link|piped links]] to non-piped ones where doing so does not change the destination of the link, to comply with [[WP:NOPIPE]] and [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]. That is, if both [[Foo|bar]] and [[bar]] lead to the same article or section directly or indirectly (i.e. through a redirect or not), the former is converted to the latter. Links to non-main namespaces and to redirects ending in " (disambiguation)" will not be replaced. The button is available only in source mode (not [[mw:2017 wikitext editor|2017 editor]]). ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/Unpipe.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. ==Acknowledgements== This script relies on [[User:Pathoschild|Pathoschild]]'s [[m:TemplateScript|TemplateScript]] framework. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}
